title: Junior Business Development Manager at Aparna Constructions

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Aparna Constructions
jsonLd.description:
Aparna Constructions has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aparna Constructions:
Aparna Constructions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aparna Constructions!
